topStories.title: US tightens social media vetting — how your posts, likes may impact H-1B, K-3, G-5 visa applications
topStories.description: The US expanded its social media screening and vetting process to include more visa categories including G-5, H-3, H-4 dependents of H-3, K-1, K-2, K-3, Q, R-1, R-2, S, T, and U.

topStories.title: TSA wait times spike at major US airports as DHS funding stalemate continues
topStories.description: Acting TSA Administrator Ha Nguyen McNeill told Congress on Wednesday (March 25) that some airport wait times have exceeded 4.5 hours.

topStories.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
topStories.description: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.

topStories.title: US Emissions Cost World $10 Trillion Since 1990
topStories.description: Study finds US emissions caused $10 trillion in global losses since 1990, with developing nations bearing the brunt of climate damage.

topStories.title: Row Over CBI Probe Into Suicide Triggers Congress Rift In Punjab
topStories.description: An official of the warehousing corporation died by suicide after accusing former Punjab minister Laljit Singh Bhullar of harassing him

topStories.title: 'Better get serious soon': Trump warns Iran, says 'negotiators are very different and strange'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Thursday (local time) warned Iran to ‘get serious soon’ regarding a deal with Washington, adding that if it gets too late, 'there will be no turning back.'

topStories.title: US prepares for massive 'final blow' against Iran, report says Trump ready to escalate if...
topStories.description: The US is reportedly planning a “final blow” against Iran. A report claimed that there are four major “final blow” options Trump could choose from.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges GOP to end filibuster amid DHS shutdown, TSA staffing crisis, targets Chuck Schumer
dailyNews.description: In a strongly worded message on social media, Trump pressed lawmakers to eliminate the Senate filibuster rule, which requires 60 votes to advance legislation.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel’s ‘plumber’ remark on US security chief triggers outrage: ‘Not a great look’
dailyNews.description: US late-night host Jimmy Kimmel is facing criticism online after mocking the country’s new Homeland Security chief as a “plumber” during his show, with many calling the remark elitist and dismissive of working-class professions.

dailyNews.title: What happened to Harish Rana | All you need to know about the man behind the right to ‘dignity in death’
dailyNews.description: This is the first time the Supreme Court has allowed the use of passive euthanasia to alleviate the suffering of a person

dailyNews.title: Trump to hold cabinet meeting today amid DHS shutdown pressure and Iran war
dailyNews.description: The Cabinet forum is scheduled to begin at 10 a.m. EDT, with Trump expected to discuss both domestic operational challenges and foreign policy priorities amid the continuing DHS funding deadlock.

dailyNews.title: ‘Five Nights at Epstein’s’ Game Goes Viral at US School Campuses
dailyNews.description: Merve Lapus’s 13-year-old daughter told her dad she was horrified: This month, whenever her teacher stepped out of the room, kids in the class used their devices to play a new online game called Five Nights at Epstein’s.

dailyNews.title: ‘Wants to keep India in loop’: Former diplomat Gurjit Singh on Trump's call to PM Modi
dailyNews.description: Former diplomat Gurjit Singh says the Trump-Modi call signals the US wants to keep India closely involved and consulted in ongoing developments.

dailyNews.title: Yankees shortstop José Caballero makes MLB history, becomes first player to use Automated Ball-Strike System
dailyNews.description: New York Yankees shortstop José Caballero made MLB history as the first player to use the Automated Ball-Strike System, losing his challenge on Opening Day.

dailyNews.title: Barry Bonds reveals George Steinbrenner's ultimatum that kept him from joining Yankees
dailyNews.description: Barry Bonds revealed he almost joined the New York Yankees, but a contract ultimatum from George Steinbrenner pushed him to sign with the San Francisco Giants.

dailyNews.title: Josh Duhamel says he's now 72% ready for a zombie apocalypse at his 'doomsday' cabin but fears AI robots more
dailyNews.description: Josh Duhamel says he is now 72% ready for a zombie apocalypse at his off-the-grid Minnesota cabin, but admits AI robots now worry him more than zombies.

dailyNews.title: Rams, 49ers to meet in Australia for historic NFL game as league reveals date and time
dailyNews.description: The Los Angeles Rams and San Francisco 49ers will make NFL history on Sept. 11 in Melbourne, Australia, playing the league's first-ever regular-season game on Australian soil.

dailyNews.title: Baseball Hall of Fame pitcher goes in depth how ABS system will improve offense, how arms have to adjust
dailyNews.description: CC Sabathia praises the MLB pitch clock for bringing fans back to ballparks and says the new ABS ball-strike challenge system will help get every call right.

dailyNews.title: Michigan judge blasts woman for driving during Zoom court hearing: ‘Do you think I'm that stupid?’
dailyNews.description: A Michigan judge challenged a woman who joined a virtual hearing from a vehicle, questioning whether she was driving and ultimately issuing a default judgment.

dailyNews.title: Bills star Dion Dawkins explains his 'counter' to potential NFL 18th game: 'Careers are only getting shorter'
dailyNews.description: Buffalo Bills left tackle Dion Dawkins said an NFL 18th game may be inevitable, but warned that one extra game can change a player's entire career trajectory.

dailyNews.title: IOC announces new policy to ensure only females compete in women's competitions
dailyNews.description: The IOC announced a new policy limiting women's Olympic competition to biological females, using SRY gene screening, effective for the LA28 Games onwards.

dailyNews.title: 8th-grader stands alone with last perfect women's NCAA basketball bracket
dailyNews.description: A Pennsylvania eighth-grader is the lone person with a perfect NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament bracket out of millions of entires, and he's not even a hoops fan.

dailyNews.title: The clock is ticking: DHS shutdown endangers FIFA World Cup security preparations
dailyNews.description: The DHS shutdown is threatening 2026 FIFA World Cup security, with 95% of TSA employees unpaid and callout rates growing worse at major U.S. airports.

topStories.title: Trump tells 'strange' Iranian negotiators to 'get serious soon' or 'it won't be pretty'
topStories.description: Iranian negotiators must "get serious" about a deal to end the war, President Donald Trump warned in a Truth Social post, threatening "no turning back."

topStories.title: Republicans in Congress Fret Over Trump Administration’s Handling of Iran War
topStories.description: G.O.P. lawmakers who have given the Trump administration wide latitude to wage war with no congressional input are growing frustrated as officials offer little detail about ground troops, cost or timeline.

topStories.description: Plus, OnlyFans’ billionaire owner dies at 43.

topStories.title: Some Judges See Risks in Fiery Opinions Warning of Threats to Democracy
topStories.description: Federal judges are weighing strategies for how to respond to the high stakes, anonymous threats and politicized atmosphere of the Trump era.

topStories.title: Trump Calls for Law Cracking Down on Crime and ‘Rogue Judges’
topStories.description: Ahead of the midterms, President Trump told a Republican gathering that he wants to go after repeat offenders and “rogue judges that are criminals.”

topStories.title: Trump to Delay Nominating New C.D.C. Director
topStories.description: The administration has yet to find a candidate who aligns with Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s agenda while avoiding his unpopular stance on vaccines.

topStories.description: At least 163 people have been killed in the Trump administration’s campaign against suspected drug smuggling.

dailyNews.description: At least 163 people have been killed in the Trump administration’s campaign against suspected drug smuggling.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Investors Target Foes of Clean Energy, Seeking Revenge
dailyNews.description: Renewable energy leaders said their industry got “rolled” in President Trump’s tax bill. Now they’re fighting back, starting in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran to accept defeat as Israel kills another top commander
dailyNews.description: Trump warns Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late," as Israel says it's killed the Iranian commander behind the Strait of Hormuz closure.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran war as Israel claims Alireza Tangsiri was killed, Trump insists talks are occurring
dailyNews.description: Israel says an airstrike killed Alireza Tangsiri, the commander of the Iranian Revolutionary Guards' navy. This comes as President Trump insists that talks are occurring between the U.S. and Iran, which Tehran is denying. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Ramy Inocencio report.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranian negotiators 'better get serious soon, before it is too late'
dailyNews.description: Trump's comments come amid ongoing confusion over whether the U.S. and Iran have held negotiations over ending the war.

dailyNews.title: Meet Figure AI: The company behind the humanoid robot hosted by Melania Trump
dailyNews.description: The White House hosted its first humanoid robot guest, with first lady Melania Trump appearing alongside a robot from startup Figure AI.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Justices Barrett, Gorsuch ‘sicken me’ after Supreme Court tariff ruling
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump did not have authority under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Higher gas prices from Iran war could offset bigger tax refunds from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
dailyNews.description: Amid the Iran war, higher gas prices could offset the bigger tax refunds from President Donald Trump's "big beautiful bill," according to some analysts.

dailyNews.title: Republicans block Democratic push for Trump Jr. subpoena
dailyNews.description: The presidents family businesses have been heavily scrutinized during his second term in the Oval Office.

dailyNews.title: Attacks Escalate in Middle East as Trump Insists Iran Wants a Deal
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel exchanged a new wave of strikes on Wednesday as President Donald Trump insisted Iran is desperate for a deal, saying, “They want to make a deal so badly, but they’re afraid to say it.” It comes as gas prices are continuing to rise worldwide with Iran blocking oil through the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump might be eyeing Iran's Kharg Island. Here's why that's a risk.
dailyNews.description: The U.S. could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island, an offshore terminal which 90% of its crude oil exports pass.

dailyNews.title: DOJ says it erroneously relied on ICE memo to justify immigration courthouse arrests
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration admitted in a court filing that it had erroneously relied on an ICE memo to justify arrests at immigration courthouses as part of an ongoing federal case brought by groups seeking to block the tactic.

dailyNews.title: Tensions flare during Iran briefing on Capitol Hill over lack of clarity on Trump's strategy
dailyNews.description: Much of the frustration during the briefing for the House Armed Services Committee focused on the prospect of sending U.S. ground troops to Iran, sources said.
